description: Fifteen selected and evolved prompts each solve four fresh six-case blocks. This holds total calls at 60 while halving the number of sequences per Luna call.

strategies.name: Six-Case Depth Swarm
strategies.description: A balanced 15-prompt generation swarm with greater attention available per case.

stages.instruction: Work carefully on this smaller case set. For each sequence, compare global structures, verify a late suffix when possible, and return the exact continuation supported by the strongest compact rule.
